title: Set up tracking inside GA4
description:
To see expanded parameters in Realtime: Click on clixsy_review_redirect in that list. It should expand to show the event parameters (location_name, destination_url, etc.).       
                                                                                           
  Why it's not in Engagement → Events yet: GA4 takes 24-48 hours to process data into the
  standard reports. Realtime is instant, but Engagement → Events only shows after GA4's
  daily processing. It will appear there tomorrow.

  To see the custom parameters in standard reports (once data appears), you need to
  register them as custom dimensions first:

  1. Go to Admin → Custom definitions → Custom dimensions
  2. Click Create custom dimension and add each:

 ┌─────────────────┬─────────────────┐
  │ Dimension name  │ Event parameter │
  ├─────────────────┼─────────────────┤
  │ Location Name   │ location_name   │
  ├─────────────────┼─────────────────┤
  │ Destination URL │ destination_url │
  ├─────────────────┼─────────────────┤
  │ Place ID        │ place_id        │
  ├─────────────────┼─────────────────┤
  │ Redirect ID     │ redirect_id     │
  ├─────────────────┼─────────────────┤
  │ Location ID     │ location_id     │
  └─────────────────┴─────────────────┘

Please note, that if the client will send just a page url to the client we will not be able to count the "click" event, since the client will paste the URL into a browser without an actual "click" event. Worth knowing.

Did you know: Older Air Conditioners using previous generations of refrigerant may have higher operating costs and be louder than the current generation of AC's? If you are curious about a more efficient and quieter system, give us a call today for more information! (POST 1.jpg)
 
A clogged filter can hamper equipment performance, increase operating costs and occasionally even cause serious equipment malfunctions! (Dirty.jpg & Clean.jpg)
 
Tricky install locations are no trouble for us! This new Heat Pump system was installed on a steep hillside, but the gravel filled box we built underneath ensures the unit will remain level for years to come! Have a challenging project? Give us a call and let us know how we can help! (HP1.jpg)


Thanks much.

title: Elevated comfort attribution
description: Christophe shared that he'd like to get their attribution in Service Titan straightened out. This was sparked by an update from Service Titan that added an "organic search" tracking number, competing with the organic search tracking number he had manually created a couple of months ago. He'd like to have their attribution reviewed and cleaned up.

title: Review link attribution
description:
Christophe would like to know whether our review link (https://goelevatedcomfort.com/leave-a-review) can track interactions. If not, this is something I can bring up with Corey and include in the larger conversation with Elevated about attribution. 


from the client
"I was wondering if you had metrics on the review link you sent over which has been part of my review email campaign for some time now.
I am interested in seeing if you have a way of tracking the interactions with the link, and specifically if a click on the link actually generated a review?
Through Service Titan I have a “sent” and “opened” metric as well as a “clicked” metric, but I don’t know if ST is actually tracking the click on the link, or a click on one of the other links in the email.
Essentially anything that can help me track the efficacy of this particular campaign would be super cool.

title: Potential Referal Page
description:
Christophe wants to explore creating a referral page that will be only accessible through a link or QR code they can give out for referrals.

He wants to know what solutions we can provide, and if "locking down" a page in this way is something we can do.

Direct from client:
Matt and I have tried various ways of activating a referral campaign, with somewhat limited success. Last night I had an idea that I want to run by you and perhaps get some help with.
 
One of the difficulties we’ve had is getting the right people’s attention at the right time. We’ve tried via email (didn’t work) and we currently have a text campaign as well, but the audience has a lot of… shall we politely say chaff in it.
 
My idea is to have you guys build a page, linked to our website that is a referral webform, which like our current webform would send email notifications when completed. The trick is to create a URL that I can then generate a QR code form to print business cards as a leave-behind at client’s houses. If it’s possible to make the page in such a way that the only way to access it is via the QR code, that would be ideal to prevent spam / abuse by random people / competitors.
 
Would love your thoughts on this!

title: GBP & LSA Down Mitigation
assignees: Alina Neamtu, Clayton Coombs, Corey V, David Nickerson, Mikey King
description:
Christophe wants to know, with the GMB and LSA down, what mitigation strategies heading into summer they can implement.
cc:  
Verification Task Related to this issue: Cotati location: Verification Required Status - J364 Elevated Comfort

Here are his ideas that he'd like some feedback on.

"Evidently, with our primary GMB and LSA down for an undetermined amount of time, we need to look at mitigation strategies heading into the most lucrative time of the year.
 
I have two thoughts which I would like your feedback and advice on.
 
#1: Use this as an opportunity to actively grow our two other GMB profiles. With this in mind I wanted to get a detailed breakdown of how to best leverage the “posts” to the profiles, so that I can do my part. If there are any other things that can be done on my level to boost the other GMBs then I am all ears. I had also thought of using service titan’s database to do a review request email blast for clients that had a recent install in those two areas through the Service Titan interface.
 
#2: Is this the right time to open an LSA for our San Rafael location, and what is involved in that? San Rafael is a great market and having an LSA presence there might help balm the wounds of Cotati being down for the moment?
 
Please let me know any and all thoughts you have. Thank you for your continued efforts and support."
